
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Grandpa Catfish's Cornbread.
    Summary: Nathan,

Please please please follow this recipe if you want cornbread.  It will never do you wrong and you won’t have the same experience I did the first time I made cornbread for your father and turned out inedible.  I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 1 cups Cornmeal, 1 cups Flour, 1 tablespoons Baking Powder, 0.25 cups Sugar, 0.5 tablespoons salt, 0.25 cups Oil or melted butter, 1 cups milk, 1  egg
    Tags: undefined
